title: *West* Fabrication Supervisor, Welding (Oil & Gas Sector) #NJN
description:
• Ensure compliance to be HS&E pollcies and procedures.
  • Ensure 65 program is maintained in all workshop and storage areas.
  • Providing day to day leadership and management of the Fabrication team.
  • Participate in, and where necessary, lead LEAN initiatives to improve operational efficiencies to drive operational excellence.
  • Monitor all Fabrication operations.
  • Review all WPS prior to work starting and highlight any issues to welders and fitters.
  • Ensure fabrication work orders are executed per production schedule.
  • Select welding procedures, evaluate, and specify welding repairs and stress relief treatments, to ensure comblance win Iterationa ane customer Standares.
  • Review technical drawings and ensure that production issues are addressed by the responsible departments.
  • Participate in technical audit of 3rd party, sub-contract, fabrication contractors.
  • Investigate Fabrication NCR's and implement corrective and preventative measures to meet agreed quality KPI'S.
  • Ensure all Inspection equipment, welding plant, flux ovens, welding rod heaters and quivers are in calibration.
  • Review tabnication routing and timing on works orders
  • Control purchasing/inventory of all associated welding consumables.
  • Ensure welding consumables are checked and maintained in climate-controlled store.
  • Review actual times against routing times after work orders are completed.
  • Manage employee overtime and vacation to meet current workload and schedule.


Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
